title: cordyline fraseri
intro: Cordyline fraseri, also known as the cabbage tree or palm tree, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand and southeastern Australia. Its leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Cordyline fraseri can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used to support cardiovascular health and immune function.
